name: Christian Shibeshi
title: Power Platform Consultant
summary: Senior Power Platform Consultant with 9 years of enterprise experience designing and delivering mission-critical solutions across banking, financial services, aerospace, and telecommunications. Specializes in Power Apps (Canvas, Model-Driven, Custom Pages), Power Automate, Power BI, Dataverse architecture, D365 CE, and Azure integrations. Deep expertise in GRC-compliant deployments, CI/CD via Azure DevOps, and custom API connectors in regulated enterprise environments.

experience.company: Royal Bank of Canada / City National Bank
experience.title: Power Platform Consultant
highlights: Owned and operated GRC (Governance, Risk & Compliance) systems built on Power Platform
Architected Dataverse-based relational data models for regulated banking workflows
Built Model-Driven Apps and Canvas Apps for internal compliance and audit tracking
Implemented Power Automate flows for automated approval chains and audit logging
Integrated Power Platform with Azure API Management and custom REST connectors
Maintained CI/CD pipelines via Azure DevOps for deployment to production

experience.title: Power Platform Developer
highlights: Built loan automation workflows using Power Automate and Dataverse
Designed and deployed financial services Canvas Apps for loan officers
Integrated core banking APIs via custom connectors in Power Platform
Developed Power BI dashboards for executive loan portfolio reporting
Implemented automated notification and escalation flows

experience.title: Power Platform Consultant
highlights: Delivered engineering workflow automation solutions using Power Platform
Built Power Pages portals for external vendor and supplier collaboration
Architected Model-Driven Apps for engineering change management
Integrated Power Platform with SharePoint Online and Azure services
Led CI/CD pipeline setup for Power Platform solution deployment via Azure DevOps

experience.title: Microsoft 365 / SharePoint Developer
highlights: Developed SPFx (SharePoint Framework) web parts and extensions
Led SharePoint Online migration projects from on-premises environments
Built service desk automation systems using Power Automate
Created Power Apps for internal IT service management
Delivered enterprise intranet solutions on Microsoft 365

certifications: Microsoft Certified: Power Platform Solution Architect Expert
